splitDefinition.method: Stable Fisher-Yates shuffle over scenario indices using Mulberry32 seed 0xc0def00d.

evaluationDesign.causalHistory: referencePoll rows with elapsedMicroseconds <= anchor elapsedMicroseconds
evaluationDesign.label: interpolated referencePoll at anchor + horizon

cpuFeatureAudit.detectionMethod: Node os.cpus plus optional CURSOR_PREDICTION_CPU_FEATURES_JSON override; fallback tries kernel32 IsProcessorFeaturePresent via PowerShell Add-Type
notes: CPU feature override came from CURSOR_PREDICTION_CPU_FEATURES_JSON, generated from PowerShell .NET Intrinsics.

familyDefinitions.FSMN: Horizon-aware finite-memory residual over the Step 3 causal feature vector.
familyDefinitions.CSFSMN: Context-sensitive FSMN segmented by horizon and scheduler-delay context.
familyDefinitions.VFSMN: Velocity-focused FSMN using LS12/LS8/last2 velocity projections and speed.
familyDefinitions.VFSMNv2: Velocity FSMN plus acceleration/history stability and a causal resume-tail guard.
familyDefinitions.CVFSMN: Compact convolutional-style finite-memory model using history aggregates and velocity memory.
familyDefinitions.CVFSMNv2: Compact FSMN v2 with scheduler context, stability features, and guarded tail correction.

cpuProfiles.note: same math shape, stricter accumulation/tail checks

CSFSMN large: Context-sensitive FSMN segmented by horizon and scheduler-delay context.
VFSMN small: Velocity-focused FSMN using LS12/LS8/last2 velocity projections and speed.
VFSMN medium: Velocity-focused FSMN using LS12/LS8/last2 velocity projections and speed.
VFSMNv2 medium: Velocity FSMN plus acceleration/history stability and a causal resume-tail guard.
CVFSMN small: Compact convolutional-style finite-memory model using history aggregates and velocity memory.
CVFSMN medium: Compact convolutional-style finite-memory model using history aggregates and velocity memory.
CVFSMNv2 medium: Compact FSMN v2 with scheduler context, stability features, and guarded tail correction.
CVFSMNv2 large: Compact FSMN v2 with scheduler context, stability features, and guarded tail correction.

nextStepRecommendation.advanceCondition: Advance only if tail deltas against Step 3 teacher are acceptable; otherwise keep Step 3 teacher and use Step 4 features for guarded Step 5.
